name: ONESPAWORLD HOLDINGS Ltd
business: OneSpaWorld is a global services company and the market leader in the outsourced maritime health and wellness market. It operates health and wellness centers on cruise ships and at destination resorts, offering health, wellness, aesthetics, and fitness services and products to guests. The majority of revenue is earned through long-term agreements with cruise line partners that provide exclusive rights to offer services and sell products onboard.

exposures.sentence: We have developed proprietary technology, processes and staff training tools, including tools incorporating artificial intelligence, to consistently measure, analyze and maximize onboard and destination resort data, revenue and profitability.

To achieve this, our strategic priorities include programs that promote responsible practices throughout our business, assure a respectful and equitable workplace, enhance our employees' personal and career development, strengthen our data privacy and cybersecurity, and support local communities and organizations.

catalysts.event: Medi-spa services to be offered on 157 ships
catalysts.sentence: By the end of 2026, we expect to offer medi-spa services on 157 ships.

catalysts.event: Existing cruise line partners to introduce 26 new ships
catalysts.sentence: By the end of 2030, our existing cruise line partners are expected to introduce 26 new ships.

tamClaims.claim: Global ocean-going cruise passenger volume was 34.6 million in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: In its 2025 State of the Cruise Industry Report, CLIA reported global passenger volume of approximately 34.6 million ocean-going cruisers globally in 2024, a 6.8% increase from 2019 levels.

tamClaims.claim: Global cruise capacity forecast to reach 42 million passengers in 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: CLIA noted that global cruise capacity is forecast to continue growing year over year, from approximately 6.3 million passengers in 1995 to an all-time high of 42 million passengers in 2028, representing a compound annual growth rate of 5.8%.

tamClaims.claim: Global wellness tourism was $894 billion in 2024, projected to reach $1.38 trillion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the Global Wellness Institute reported that global wellness tourism, a sub-category of the $6.8 trillion global wellness economy, was an $894 billion industry in 2024, growing 35% since 2019. The Global Wellness Institute projected an average annual growth rate of 9.1% for global wellness tourism, reaching a projected market size of $1.38 trillion in 2029.
